title: Staff: Taylor Boone
staff_title: Grant Administrator, Office of Research Administration
previous_roles: Grant development & fundraising, Digital Harbor Foundation
Peer reviewer/facilitator for Baltimore community-driven funding initiatives
content:
Taylor Boone is the Grant Administrator, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-5291. Email: taylor.boone@morgan.edu.

Taylor Boone is a Grant Administrator for the Office of Research Administration (ORA). A proud Morgan State alumna, they bring a strong background in grant administration, grassroots advocacy, and community engagement to their role — supporting faculty and staff in managing research funding and compliance.

Prior to returning to Morgan, Taylor Boone worked in grant development and fundraising at Open Works and Digital Harbor Foundation, focusing on capacity building, donor relations, and operational support for education and workforce development programs.

Deeply committed to local advocacy, they have served as peer reviewers and facilitators for community-driven funding initiatives, ensuring equitable support for Baltimore-based grassroots organizations.

Education: BS in Economics, Morgan State University.
